feed.title: GTFS Scorecard: feed quality changes
feed.subtitle: Transit agencies whose GTFS data quality grade or score moved since their last check.

entry.title: Williamsburg Area Transit Authority: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, Williamsburg Area Transit Authority's GTFS data quality went from 60.2 (D) to 59.8 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: The Comet: grade dropped B to C
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, The Comet's GTFS data quality went from 80.2 (B) to 79.8 (C). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Flex: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, Flex's GTFS data quality went from 60.0 (D) to 59.6 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Marin Transit: grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, Marin Transit's GTFS data quality went from 70.2 (C) to 69.7 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Franklin Regional Transit Authority (FRTA): grade dropped B to C
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, Franklin Regional Transit Authority (FRTA)'s GTFS data quality went from 80.2 (B) to 79.8 (C). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Cedar Rapids Transit: grade dropped A to B
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, Cedar Rapids Transit's GTFS data quality went from 90.3 (A) to 89.9 (B). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Cedar Rapids Transit: grade dropped A to B
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, Cedar Rapids Transit's GTFS data quality went from 90.3 (A) to 89.9 (B). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Camarillo Area Transit: grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, Camarillo Area Transit's GTFS data quality went from 70.1 (C) to 69.7 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Camarillo Area Transit: grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-05, Camarillo Area Transit's GTFS data quality went from 70.1 (C) to 69.7 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.
